rationale: In the citing paper, Lambrecht and Skiera (2006) appears in a grouped citation that summarizes prior empirical work on nonlinear pricing in telephony/Internet services. The text does not assign this specific paper a distinct conceptual, methodological, or empirical role in the new identification strategy or estimation framework. The citing paper's concrete model setup and estimation choices are tied to other sources (for example, Lambrecht, Seim, and Skiera 2007), so this citation functions as background context rather than a direct building block.
